propositions: The grandfathering check must enforce authentication only for events whose introducing commit is the enforce_since anchor or a descendant, treating strictly-prior unsigned events as grandfathered.
The enforcement-boundary anchor must be an existing tickets-branch commit that every pre-signing unsigned event strictly precedes, not the code flip commit on main.
A regression test must drive the boundary via the identity.enforce_since config/env path and assert per-event grandfathered flags in a single mixed store (pre-boundary passes, post-boundary fails).
The chosen 40-hex anchor SHA and its rationale must be recorded as a ticket comment for the atomic-flip story to consume verbatim.
This story must not modify rebar.toml; its only file change is the new test file under tests/.
Running rebar verify-identity --all --require-authenticated --since <anchor> must exit 0 with zero enforced non-verified events.
